# ecspresso Provider

Configure the ecspresso provider. The provider currently has no top-level configuration; all configuration lives on the resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ecspresso = {
      source = "fujiwara/ecspresso"
    }
  }
}

provider "ecspresso" {}
```
